author: PlayStation YouTube
text:
Street Fighter 6 - Yasmine Arrives! Fighting Pass | PS5 & PS4 Games
https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/street-fighter-6/

Make for a warm welcome as the Yasmine Arrives! Fighting Pass cuts in!

Earn Premium Rewards and shine like the stars with new EX colors for Juri and Chun-Li, Challenger Screen Illustrations for Jamie and Sagat, the seafaring classic "Pirate Ship Higemaru", and more!

#ps5 #ps5games #ps4 #ps4games #StreetFighter6 #SF6 #Yasmine #Capcom
